about.heading: Local Sydney Electricians You Can Trust
about.body: Gold Electrical Services Australia is a fully licensed and insured electrical contractor based in Sydney. We serve homeowners and businesses right across Greater Sydney — from the inner west to the Hills District, the Northern Beaches to the Sutherland Shire. Our team arrives on time, explains the work in plain language, and charges a fair, fixed price. No hidden fees.

offer.headline: Free Fixed-Price Quote — No Call-Out Fee

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Fault Finding
services.summary: Fast, safe diagnosis and repair of all electrical faults across Sydney — from tripping circuits to burnt-out power points.
services.intro: Electrical faults don't keep business hours. Whether you have a circuit that keeps tripping, a power point that's dead, flickering lights or a burning smell coming from your switchboard, the Gold Electrical team is ready to respond fast. We use professional diagnostic equipment to find the root cause of any fault — not just the symptom — and fix it correctly the first time. All repair work is carried out to AS/NZS 3000 wiring standards and fully tested before we leave your property. Same-day service across Greater Sydney.
benefits: Same-day and emergency callouts available across Greater Sydney
Root-cause diagnosis — we fix the problem, not just the symptom
All work carried out to AS/NZS 3000 wiring standards
Fully insured with public liability cover
Clear, written fixed-price quote before work begins
All work tested and signed off before we leave

sections.heading: Common Electrical Faults We Fix
sections.body: Tripping safety switches or circuit breakers are one of the most common calls we receive. Often caused by a faulty appliance, a wiring defect or moisture ingress, we isolate the circuit, identify the fault and restore power safely. We also handle dead GPOs, sparking outlets, lights that flicker or buzz, and any situation where you can smell burning from an outlet or switchboard. Don't ignore those warning signs — call us immediately.

sections.heading: Emergency Electrical Repairs Across Sydney
sections.body: Power loss, exposed live wires or burning electrical smells are genuine emergencies. Our licensed electricians are available 24 hours a day, seven days a week for urgent callouts across Sydney. We aim to have a tradie on-site within 60 minutes for genuine emergencies in the inner suburbs, with fast response times across Greater Sydney.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency in Sydney?
faqs.answer: For genuine emergencies in the inner suburbs and major centres, we aim to be on-site within 60 minutes. Across Greater Sydney we aim for same-day attendance. Call our 24/7 line and we'll give you an accurate ETA.

faqs.question: My safety switch keeps tripping — is that dangerous?
faqs.answer: A repeatedly tripping safety switch is your system telling you there's a problem. It could be a faulty appliance or a wiring defect. Do not simply reset it and ignore the issue — call a licensed electrician to find the cause before it becomes a hazard.

faqs.question: How much does an electrical fault finding visit cost?
faqs.answer: Our fault finding callouts start from $120. We'll give you a fixed-price quote before any work begins so there are no surprises on the invoice.

seo.title: Electrical Repairs & Fault Finding Sydney | Gold Electrical Services
seo.description: Fast, professional electrical fault finding and repairs across Sydney. Tripping circuits, dead power points, burning smells — same-day and 24/7 emergency callouts from $120.

services.title: Switchboard Upgrades Sydney
services.summary: Upgrade from old ceramic fuses to modern safety switches and protect your home or business from electrical hazards.
services.intro: Older homes across Sydney — particularly those built before 1990 — often still have ceramic fuse-wire switchboards that offer no real protection against electric shock or electrical fires. Modern safety switches (RCDs) detect leakage current in milliseconds and shut off the circuit before harm is done. Gold Electrical Services Australia upgrades switchboards across Greater Sydney, replacing outdated equipment with a clean, compliant modern board fitted with safety switches, circuit breakers and surge protection where needed. Every upgrade comes with a Certificate of Compliance.
benefits: Eliminates dangerous ceramic fuses — replaces with modern safety switches
Meets current AS/NZS 3000 and NSW electrical safety requirements
Reduces the risk of electrical fire and electric shock
Makes room for solar, battery and EV charger circuits
Increases your property value and simplifies future electrical upgrades
Clean, neat installation with labelled circuits

sections.heading: Does Your Switchboard Need an Upgrade?
sections.body: Signs you need a switchboard upgrade include: ceramic fuse holders rather than circuit breakers, no safety switches (RCDs), the board feels warm to the touch, fuses blow frequently, or you're planning a major renovation or solar installation. A modern switchboard is the foundation of a safe electrical system — and in NSW, safety switches are legally required on power and lighting circuits in new work.

sections.heading: What the Upgrade Involves
sections.body: We start with a free assessment of your existing board. We then replace the entire enclosure or upgrade within the existing enclosure where possible, install safety switches, correctly labelled circuit breakers, a main switch and surge protection. The switchboard is fully tested, and we provide you with a Certificate of Compliance for your records and insurer.

faqs.question: How long does a switchboard upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential switchboard upgrades take between 3 and 6 hours. Power to the property will be off during the changeover, but we minimise downtime and let you know what to expect before we start.

faqs.question: Do I need a switchboard upgrade before installing solar?
faqs.answer: In most cases, yes. Solar inverters require a dedicated circuit and appropriate safety devices. We assess your existing board as part of every solar quote and let you know if an upgrade is needed.

faqs.question: Will I get a Certificate of Compliance for the switchboard work?
faqs.answer: Yes. All licensed electrical work in NSW requires a Certificate of Compliance. We provide this as standard on completion of every switchboard upgrade.

seo.title: Switchboard Upgrades Sydney | Safety Switch Installation | Gold Electrical
seo.description: Upgrade your Sydney home's switchboard to modern safety switches and circuit breakers. Licensed electricians, from $650. Certificates of Compliance included.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design Sydney
services.summary: LED downlights, feature lighting, smart lighting and sensor lights — designed and installed by licensed Sydney electricians.
services.intro: Good lighting transforms a space. Whether you're renovating your kitchen, upgrading your outdoor entertainment area or making the switch from halogen to energy-efficient LED downlights, Gold Electrical Services Australia handles the design and installation from start to finish. We work with a wide range of fittings from leading brands and can help you choose the right colour temperature, brightness and control system for each room. Smart lighting integration with Google Home, Alexa and Apple HomeKit is available for new builds and renovations.
benefits: Huge energy savings switching from halogen to LED downlights
Full design service — layout, colour temperature and brightness
Smart lighting integration with Google Home, Alexa and Apple HomeKit
Sensor lights, timer switches and dusk-to-dawn outdoor lighting
Feature and pendant lighting for kitchens, dining rooms and living areas
All work installed to AS/NZS 3000 and fully tested on completion

sections.heading: LED Downlight Upgrades — Cut Your Power Bill
sections.body: Replacing old halogen downlights with modern LED globes can cut the energy consumption of your lighting by up to 80 per cent. We swap out your existing fittings or install new recessed LED downlights in plasterboard ceilings across Sydney homes and offices. We handle the wiring, insulation covers (IC-F rated where required) and dimmer compatibility — so everything just works.

sections.heading: Outdoor & Security Lighting
sections.body: Floodlights, pathway lights, sensor-activated security lighting and dusk-to-dawn LEDs — we install outdoor lighting that improves security and adds real kerb appeal to your property. We position sensors correctly to reduce false triggers and use quality weatherproof fittings rated for Australian outdoor conditions.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to install LED downlights in Sydney?
faqs.answer: LED downlight installation starts from $95 per light for a standard swap-out of existing fittings. New installations requiring new wiring or ceiling penetrations will be quoted on a job basis. Call us for a free quote.

faqs.question: Can you install dimmer switches for my LED lights?
faqs.answer: Yes — but not all LED globes and dimmers are compatible. We source dimmable LED fittings that work correctly with quality dimmer switches and test the setup before we leave to make sure you get smooth, flicker-free dimming.

seo.title: Lighting Installation Sydney | LED Downlights & Smart Lighting | Gold Electrical
seo.description: Professional lighting installation across Sydney. LED downlights from $95, smart lighting, outdoor security lights and feature lighting. Licensed electricians — free quotes.

services.title: Solar & Battery Storage Installation Sydney
services.summary: CEC-accredited solar panel and battery storage installations sized for real Sydney homes and businesses.
services.intro: Sydney's sunshine is among the best in the country, and a quality solar system can cut your electricity bills dramatically. Gold Electrical Services Australia is CEC-accredited for solar design and installation. We assess your actual energy use, your roof orientation and shading, and your grid tariff to size a system that delivers the fastest real-world payback — not just the biggest panels-per-dollar ratio. We also install battery storage systems so you can use your solar energy day and night and protect yourself from rising grid prices.
benefits: CEC-accredited solar installer — required for government STC rebates
Proper energy assessment before recommending system size
Quality tier-1 panels and inverters — not cheap imports
Battery storage options to store solar energy for use at night
10-year workmanship warranty on all installations
We handle the network connection and STC rebate paperwork

sections.heading: How Solar Works in Sydney
sections.body: Solar panels generate DC electricity from sunlight. An inverter converts it to AC power for use in your home. Any excess is either exported to the grid (earning you a feed-in tariff credit) or stored in a battery for use at night. Sydney's north-facing roofs with minimal shading are ideal for solar, but west-facing panels can be a better choice for households that use more power in the afternoon. We model your specific situation before recommending a system.

sections.heading: Battery Storage — Is It Worth It?
sections.body: Battery prices have come down significantly in recent years. A battery allows you to store your excess solar generation and use it in the evening peak — when grid electricity costs most. For Sydney households on a time-of-use tariff, a battery can substantially cut your grid import costs. We model the payback period honestly before you commit to anything.

faqs.question: What size solar system do I need for a Sydney home?
faqs.answer: Most Sydney homes with a quarterly electricity bill of $400–$700 benefit from a 6.6kW to 10kW system. We look at your actual usage data and roof space to recommend the right size — not just the biggest system we can fit.

faqs.question: Do I need a new switchboard for solar?
faqs.answer: In many cases, yes. Your switchboard needs a dedicated circuit and appropriate safety devices for the solar inverter. We include a switchboard assessment in every solar quote and let you know upfront if an upgrade is required.

faqs.question: How long does a solar installation take?
faqs.answer: Most residential solar installations take one to two days. Battery storage additions typically add half a day. We'll give you a clear timeline when we provide your quote.

seo.title: Solar & Battery Storage Sydney | CEC-Accredited Installer | Gold Electrical
seo.description: CEC-accredited solar and battery storage installation across Sydney. Proper system sizing, tier-1 panels, and full rebate paperwork handled. From $3,500 — free quotes.

services.title: EV Charger Installation Sydney
services.summary: Licensed EV charger installation for home and business. Charge your electric vehicle safely overnight with a proper Level 2 charger.
services.intro: Electric vehicles need more than a standard power point to charge efficiently and safely. A dedicated Level 2 home EV charger (also called an EVSE or wallbox) delivers 7kW or more, charging most EVs overnight at a fraction of the running cost of petrol. Gold Electrical Services Australia installs EV chargers for all major vehicle brands across Sydney — Tesla, BYD, MG, Hyundai, Kia, BMW, Mercedes-Benz and more. We assess your switchboard capacity, run the right cable and mount the charger neatly in your garage or carport.
benefits: Proper Level 2 installation — not a makeshift power point adapter
Compatible with all major EV brands sold in Australia
Switchboard capacity check included with every quote
Tidy cable management for a professional finish
Smart charger options with app control and off-peak scheduling
Certificate of Compliance provided on completion

sections.heading: Why You Need a Proper EV Charger Installation
sections.body: Plugging your EV into a regular 10A GPO is slow and, if the outlet is old or undersized, potentially a fire risk. A dedicated 32A circuit with a quality wallbox charges at 7–11kW, typically filling most EVs overnight. It also protects your vehicle's battery management system by delivering stable, clean power. A proper installation also comes with a Certificate of Compliance — important if you ever sell the property.

sections.heading: Smart EV Chargers — Charge in the Off-Peak
sections.body: Many modern EV chargers connect to your home Wi-Fi and let you schedule charging during off-peak electricity tariff windows. If you also have solar, a smart charger can be configured to charge only when your panels are generating surplus power — maximising your solar self-consumption and cutting your running costs further. We set this up as part of the installation.

faqs.question: How much does EV charger installation cost in Sydney?
faqs.answer: EV charger installation in Sydney starts from $890, including the dedicated circuit, safety switch, and charger mount. The price of the charger unit varies by brand. We'll provide a complete written quote covering all components before any work begins.

faqs.question: Can I install an EV charger if my switchboard is old?
faqs.answer: Possibly — we assess your switchboard as part of the quote. If the board doesn't have the capacity or safety devices needed for a 32A EV circuit, we'll quote the switchboard upgrade at the same time.

faqs.question: Which EV charger brands do you install?
faqs.answer: We install all major brands including Tesla Wall Connector, Wallbox Pulsar Plus, Fronius Wattpilot, EVNEX, Ocular and JuiceBox. We're happy to advise which charger suits your vehicle and usage patterns.

seo.title: EV Charger Installation Sydney | Home EV Charging | Gold Electrical
seo.description: Licensed EV charger installation across Sydney for all EV brands. Proper Level 2 home charging from $890. Smart charger options available — free quotes.

services.title: House Rewiring Sydney
services.summary: Full and partial house rewiring by licensed Sydney electricians — make your home safe and future-ready.
services.intro: Old wiring is one of the leading causes of residential electrical fires in Australia. If your Sydney home has aluminium wiring, rubber-sheathed cables, or wiring that's simply past its service life, a full or partial rewire is the safest long-term solution. Gold Electrical Services Australia carries out house rewiring projects of all sizes — from replacing wiring in a single room to complete rewires of older Sydney homes. We work efficiently to minimise disruption and leave the property clean and ready. A Certificate of Compliance is issued on completion.
benefits: Eliminates dangerous ageing wiring — a leading cause of house fires
All new cables correctly rated and routed to AS/NZS 3000
Minimal wall damage — we use existing cavities where possible
New circuits for modern loads: EV charger, induction cooktop, solar
Works well alongside renovation and extension projects
Full Certificate of Compliance provided on completion

sections.heading: Signs Your Sydney Home Needs Rewiring
sections.body: Telltale signs include: power points or light switches that are discoloured or warm to the touch; persistent burning smell from outlets; flickering lights that aren't a globe issue; circuit breakers that trip frequently; or rubber-sheathed wiring which is typically 40-plus years old. If your home was built before 1980 and hasn't been rewired, a professional inspection is strongly recommended.

sections.heading: Combining a Rewire with Your Renovation
sections.body: If you're already opening up walls for a kitchen, bathroom or extension, it's the perfect time to upgrade the wiring behind them. We work alongside builders, plasterers and project managers to make sure the electrical rough-in is done before walls are closed. Planning this properly saves significant cost and disruption later and future-proofs the property for decades.

faqs.question: How long does a full house rewire take in Sydney?
faqs.answer: A full rewire of an average 3–4 bedroom Sydney home typically takes 3–5 days depending on access and complexity. We'll give you a detailed timeline when we quote the job.

faqs.question: Do I need to move out during a rewire?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. For partial rewires, you can usually stay in the property. For full rewires we recommend being out during the main work days for comfort and safety, but we discuss this case-by-case and plan around you where possible.

seo.title: House Rewiring Sydney | Rewiring Specialists | Gold Electrical Services
seo.description: Licensed house rewiring across Sydney. Old wiring replaced safely and to code — full and partial rewires, new circuits, Certificates of Compliance. Free quotes.

services.title: Power Points & Switch Installation Sydney
services.summary: New power points, USB outlets, outdoor GPOs and smart switches installed neatly and to code across Sydney.
services.intro: Running extension leads because you don't have enough power points is a fire hazard and a daily frustration. Gold Electrical Services Australia installs additional power points, USB charging outlets, outdoor weatherproof GPOs and smart switches in homes and businesses across Sydney. Every installation is carried out by a licensed electrician, wired from the switchboard with the correct cable rating, and fully tested before we leave. No overloaded double adaptors, no piggyback leads — just clean, safe, code-compliant power points where you actually need them.
benefits: Eliminates dangerous extension leads and overloaded power boards
USB and USB-C outlets for easy device charging
Weatherproof outdoor GPOs for entertaining areas and gardens
Smart switches compatible with Google Home, Alexa and HomeKit
Clean, flush installation with neat cable routing out of sight
All work licensed, tested and Certificate of Compliance provided

sections.heading: Where to Add Power Points in Your Sydney Home
sections.body: Kitchen bench power points, double or quad outlets in home offices, outdoor GPOs for the patio and pool area, USB outlets in bedrooms and studies, and 15A outlets for air conditioners and large appliances. We can add power points almost anywhere in your home and run the cable neatly inside walls to keep the finish clean and professional.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to add a power point in Sydney?
faqs.answer: A standard power point addition from an existing circuit starts from $95. If a new circuit from the switchboard is required, we'll quote that separately. Call us for a free, no-obligation quote.

faqs.question: Can I install a power point myself?
faqs.answer: No. All fixed electrical wiring work in NSW must be carried out by a licensed electrician. DIY electrical work is illegal, dangerous and voids your home insurance. Always use a licensed tradie.

seo.title: Power Points & Switch Installation Sydney | Gold Electrical Services
seo.description: New power points, USB outlets, outdoor GPOs and smart switches across Sydney. Licensed installation from $95 — neat, compliant and guaranteed.

services.title: Electrical Safety Inspections Sydney
services.summary: Pre-purchase, rental property and routine electrical safety inspections with clear written reports.
services.intro: Whether you're buying a Sydney property, preparing a rental for a new tenant, or simply want peace of mind that your home's electrical system is safe, a professional inspection is the smart starting point. Gold Electrical Services Australia conducts thorough electrical safety inspections and provides a plain-English written report covering every circuit, safety switch, switchboard and visible wiring. We identify hazards, non-compliances and maintenance items so you know exactly what you're dealing with before making decisions.
benefits: Comprehensive check of switchboard, circuits, safety switches and wiring
Clear written report with photos of any hazards or issues
Pre-purchase inspections — know what you're buying before you sign
Rental property inspections — meet landlord and property manager obligations
Identifies hidden hazards before they become costly or dangerous
Completed by a licensed electrician — not a non-trade inspector

sections.heading: What Our Inspection Covers
sections.body: We inspect the main switchboard condition and labelling, presence and correct operation of RCD safety switches, earthing and bonding of the electrical system, visible wiring condition in roof space and sub-floor, power points and light switches for signs of damage or overloading, and the condition of fixed appliances such as hot water units and air conditioning units. We test all safety switches under load and check correct operation of circuit breakers.

sections.heading: Pre-Purchase Electrical Inspections
sections.body: A standard building inspection doesn't always catch every electrical hazard. Our pre-purchase electrical inspection checks for the presence of dangerous old rubber-sheathed wiring past its service life, aluminium wiring common in homes built 1965 to 1985, DIY wiring that's not to code, and switchboards that need immediate upgrading. We give you a clear picture before you commit to a purchase so you can negotiate or plan accordingly.

faqs.question: How long does an electrical safety inspection take?
faqs.answer: Most residential inspections take 60–90 minutes. We'll provide the written report within 24 hours of the inspection so you have the information you need quickly.

faqs.question: Is a safety switch legally required in rental properties in NSW?
faqs.answer: Yes. NSW regulations require safety switches (RCDs) on power circuits in all rental properties. Our inspection confirms whether your property meets these requirements and what's needed to comply.

seo.title: Electrical Safety Inspections Sydney | Pre-Purchase & Rental | Gold Electrical
seo.description: Licensed electrical safety inspections across Sydney — pre-purchase, rental property and routine checks. Written reports from $250. Book online or call 24/7.

sections.body: Salt-laden air accelerates corrosion on outdoor electrical fittings, switchboards and solar panel components. We use marine-grade fittings and weatherproof enclosures where appropriate, and our inspections specifically look for corrosion-related damage that's easy to miss. If you're in a beachside property, a regular electrical inspection is a smart investment.

We handle electrical rough-ins for new builds, upgrades to older homes in St Marys and Kingswood, and the specialised demands of hobby farms and semi-rural properties around Emu Plains and Mulgoa. Whatever the job, we bring the same licensed, insured service to every property.

faqs.question: Do you install solar in Penrith?

locations.body: Many homes in the Sutherland Shire were built in the 1960s to 1980s and have electrical systems that need attention — older switchboards without safety switches, ageing wiring and not enough power points for modern life. faqs.question: How do I know if my Cronulla home needs rewiring?
faqs.answer: Warning signs include warm or discoloured power points, circuit breakers that trip often, flickering lights, a burning smell from outlets, or rubber-sheathed cables visible in your roof space. We offer an inspection and written report to assess your wiring condition accurately.

items.question: Are you licensed to carry out electrical work in NSW?
items.answer: Yes. Gold Electrical Services Australia holds a current NSW electrical contractor licence. All work is carried out by licensed electricians and backed by a Certificate of Compliance on completion.

items.question: Do you offer 24/7 emergency electrical service in Sydney?
items.answer: Yes. We provide 24/7 emergency electrical callouts across Greater Sydney. Call our main number at any time and we'll dispatch a licensed electrician to your property as fast as possible.

items.question: How do I get a quote for electrical work?
items.answer: Call us or fill in the contact form on this website. We'll arrange a time to assess the job — either in person or via a brief phone conversation for simple jobs — and provide a clear, written fixed-price quote.

items.question: Do you work on both residential and commercial properties?
items.answer: Yes. We work across residential homes, investment properties, strata buildings, retail premises and small commercial offices across Greater Sydney.

items.question: What areas of Sydney do you cover?
items.answer: We cover Greater Sydney broadly — from Penrith in the west to Manly in the east, Hornsby in the north to Sutherland and Liverpool in the south. If you're unsure, just call us and we'll confirm.

items.question: Do you provide a Certificate of Compliance after the work?
items.answer: Yes. All licensed electrical work in NSW requires a Certificate of Compliance. We provide this to you on completion of every job as a matter of course.

items.question: Do you charge a call-out fee?
items.answer: We don't charge a separate call-out fee for standard quote visits during business hours. For emergency after-hours callouts, a service fee applies — we'll tell you the amount upfront before we dispatch.

seo.title: Electrical FAQs | Gold Electrical Services Australia | Sydney Electricians
seo.description: Answers to common questions about our Sydney electrical services — licences, emergency callouts, quotes, areas covered and Certificates of Compliance.

about.body:
Gold Electrical Services Australia is a fully licensed and insured electrical contractor serving Greater Sydney. We started with a simple idea: provide honest, reliable electrical work at a fair price, show up when we say we will, and leave every job cleaner than we found it.

Our team of licensed electricians covers all aspects of residential and commercial electrical work — from fault finding and switchboard upgrades to solar and battery storage, EV charger installation, house rewiring and lighting design. We're CEC-accredited for solar installations, which means you're eligible for government STCs when you use us.

We believe in plain communication. Before we start any job, you get a clear written quote with a fixed price. No hourly surprises, no inflated invoices. After the work is done, you get a Certificate of Compliance for your records.

Gold Electrical Services Australia is proud to serve communities right across Sydney — from the Northern Beaches to the Sutherland Shire, Parramatta to the Eastern Suburbs. If you have an electrical problem, we'd love to help.

values.title: Honest Pricing
values.body: You get a written fixed-price quote before any work starts. What we quote is what you pay — no hidden fees, no inflated after-hours charges.

values.title: Safety First
values.body: Every job is carried out to AS/NZS 3000 wiring standards. We test all work before we leave and issue Certificates of Compliance as standard on every job.

values.title: We Show Up
values.body: We arrive at the agreed time, get the job done, and communicate clearly if anything changes. Respect for your time is non-negotiable.

values.title: Quality Workmanship
values.body: We use quality materials and fittings, carry out clean cable management, and stand behind our workmanship with a guarantee on all installations.
